repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Codex incomplete at beginning and end | Quires 1-3 detached, quires 4-10 sewn, quires 11-13 (ff, 79-102) detached
Previous catalogs dated this manuscript to the 13th-14th c. CE
Quire signatures on first folio of new quire in Greek (2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9) for quires 6, 7, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, beginning on f. 43
Small, upright minuscule (style rectangulaire aplati ou écrasé)
